case_title: AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED VS ABUALSHEAR, HISHAM DBA TIP TOP MARKET

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABUALSHEAR, HISHAM DBA TIP TOP MARKET
